How to find your Stake address or Stake hash in Yoroi and Daedalus wallets

Jul 1, 2024 — GUIDE

Looking at the top list and don’t know who is you? Follow this guidance may help you to find your Stake Address.

I. How to find address in Yoroi wallet

Step 1. Go to {Receive}

Step 2. Swipe to the next page

Step 3. Your Stake Hash is here (Stake key hash)

Step 4. Copy your {Stake key hash}

Step 5. Use your Web Browser, go to adastat.net and Select {Search}

Step 6. Paste your copied {Stake key hash} into Search box then Select your Staking account

Step 7 (Final). Your {Stake Address} is here (Reward address)

II. How to find address in Daedalus wallet

Step 1. Select {Staking} on Left Menu

Step 2. Go to {Rewards} on the right side

Step 3 (Final). Your {Stake Adress} is here

Back to Home
